quicksight.theme.datacolorpalette.CfnAbo: The theme colors that are used for data colors in charts. The colors description is a hexadecimal color code that consists of six alphanumerical characters, prefixed with `

quicksight.theme.datacolorpalette.Colors.Description: The hexadecimal codes for the colors.

quicksight.theme.datacolorpalette.EmptyF.Description: The hexadecimal code of a color that applies to charts where a lack of data is highlighted.

quicksight.theme.datacolorpalette.MinMax.Description: The minimum and maximum hexadecimal codes that describe a color gradient.
